productDisplayName: Converse Unisex As Chucks Black Floater
description: Take casual dressing to a new level with these Chucks from converse. The comfortable slide-in design is a great combination of superior materials and great design. Pair these with shorts or capris and tees for a cool look.Upper Canvas upper for easy maintenance and durability Cut-away slip-on upper for ventilation and style Mock metallic eyelets on the sides for maximum style Textured rubber overlay around the forefoot for shock absorption Midsole Comfort Insole made of contoured latex foam for high energy return and cushioning Outsole Vulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and traction Diamond-shaped lugs on the forefoot and heel, with horizontal lugs and grooves on the toe region and heel region, and slanting grooves along the periphery and midfoot for superior grip on all terrains shoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
